notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.emptyHint: Bill reminders and balance alerts will appear here.
notifications.pushDescription: Receive bill reminders and balance alerts even when the app is closed.
notifications.pushDenied: Permission denied by your browser. To enable, adjust the site permissions in your browser settings.
notifications.pushUnsupported: Push notifications are not available in this browser.
notifications.pushUnsupportedSw: Service Workers are disabled in this Chrome. Check chrome://flags or corporate policies.
notifications.pushUnsupportedIos: On iOS, add the app to your home screen and open it from there to enable notifications.
notifications.pushUnsupportedHttps: Push notifications require HTTPS. Access the app via a secure URL.
notifications.pushUnsupportedHint: Works in Chrome, Firefox and Edge with Service Workers enabled.

auth.tagline: Organize your finances and have clarity to make better decisions.

auth.confirmEmail: Confirm your email to continue. We sent a new code.

auth.accountCreated: Account created! Check your email for the confirmation code.
auth.disposableEmail: Disposable emails are not allowed. Use a personal or professional email.

auth.invalidPassword: Invalid password. Check the requirements and try again.
auth.invalidEmail: Invalid email. Check the address and try again.
auth.createError: Error creating account. Please try again.
auth.forgotDescription: Enter your email and we'll send a code to reset your password.
auth.forgotSuccess: If the email exists in our system, we'll send a reset code.
auth.resetDescriptionWithEmail: Enter the code sent to {email} and choose a new password.
auth.resetDescriptionNoEmail: Enter the code received by email and the new password.
auth.noEmailFound: We couldn't find the email for reset.
auth.resentCode: We sent a new code to your email.
auth.verifyDescriptionNoEmail: Enter the 6-digit code sent to your email.
auth.noEmailToVerify: We couldn't find the email to confirm.
auth.termsConsent: By creating your account, you agree to our

onboarding.title: Let’s get started!
onboarding.description: Tell us how much you have now and since when that amount is valid. We'll calculate your balance day by day from there.
onboarding.currentBalance: How much do you have today?

dashboard.chartModeCurrentHint: Card invoices with already-posted charges only
dashboard.chartModeProjectedHint: Includes upcoming card recurrences in each cycle's invoice
dashboard.alreadyWarning: Balance is in the warning zone
dashboard.noPendingDays: No days with pending items in this period.
dashboard.pendingEmptyHint: No pending items in this period.
dashboard.pendingConfirmDialogHint: Items will be realized using their estimated values. You can edit each one afterwards.

entry.description: Add an income, expense, or one-time spending, or register a credit card purchase.
entry.noCardTitle: You don't have a credit card yet
entry.noCardDescription: Register a credit card to record installment purchases.

creditCard.closingDueDay: Closes on day {closing} · Due on day {due}
creditCard.configDescription: Configure closing, due, and payment days so invoices appear correctly in your cash flow.

goals.deleteConfirmDescription: This action cannot be undone. All recorded contributions will be lost.

import.listDescription: Import a bank statement (.ofx or .qfx) and track import history.
import.uploadDescription: Select the file exported by your bank to start the import.
import.reviewDescription: Check the detected transactions before confirming the import.
import.successDescription: The selected transactions have been added to your entries.
import.importToStart: Import a statement to get started
import.selectFileError: Select an .ofx or .qfx file to continue
import.entriesAppear: Entries now appear in your entries list.

recurring.title: Recurring Accounts
recurring.description: Water, electricity, condo fees, and other bills that repeat every month with an estimated amount.
recurring.noTemplates: No recurring accounts registered. Use the button above to add water, electricity, condo fees, etc.
recurring.noResults: No accounts found with the selected filters.
recurring.archiveDescription: It will stop generating new monthly estimates. Already confirmed entries remain in the history and you can reactivate it at any time.
recurring.deleteDescription: This action is permanent and cannot be undone. The recurring account and all its settings will be permanently removed.

settings.title: Settings
settings.initialBalanceDescription: How much you had on that date. We use this as the starting point to calculate your balance for the following days.
settings.cycleStartDay: Each month, my bills start on day
settings.balanceIndicatorsDescription: Thresholds that define daily balance colors.
settings.belowYellow: Below the yellow value, the indicator turns red.
settings.lgpdDescription: Manage your personal data in accordance with privacy regulations.
settings.exportDataDescription: Download a JSON file with all your registered data.
settings.deleteAccountDescription: Permanently removes your account and all associated data.
settings.deleteConfirmMessage: This action is irreversible. All your data — transactions, cards, goals and history — will be permanently deleted.
settings.deleteError: Couldn't delete your account. Please try again.
settings.pendingAlertsDescription: Days in advance before a recurrence is shown as an alert.

common.serverErrorDescription: We couldn’t load this data. Check your connection and try again.

dayCard.recurringPending: Recurring estimated entries pending on this day

dailyEntries.cleanSlate: Your sheet is clean for today.
dailyEntries.ignoreDescription: This bill won't appear as an estimate this month. You can reactivate it later using the "Reactivate" button.
dailyEntries.deleteRecurringDescription: Return to template estimate (and apply again later) or permanently delete, marking this month as "Skipped".
dailyEntries.reopenDescription: The payment will be reversed and the entry will be removed from the cash flow. The invoice will appear as pending again and you can register the payment with a new amount.
dailyEntries.dateNote: Adjust the transaction date if it occurred on a different day than planned.
dailyEntries.cannotAdd: Cannot add entries before the initial date

creditCardsSummary.thisMonthNote: Total of the next open invoice

creditCardDetail.removeDesc: The card will be deactivated and will no longer generate new invoices. The purchase and invoice history will be preserved.

creditCardForm.paymentDayNote: Day when the invoice impacts your balance in the cash flow.

invoiceDetail.title: Invoice
invoiceDetail.paidNote: This invoice has already been paid. To change the amount, reopen the invoice.
invoiceDetail.reopenDescription: The payment will be reversed and the entry will be removed from the cash flow. The invoice will appear as pending again and you can register the payment with a new amount.
invoiceDetail.deleteDesc: All installments of this purchase will be removed from all invoices. This action cannot be undone.

recurringDrawer.subtitle: Bills like water, electricity, and condo fees that repeat every month with an estimated amount.

recurringForm.noCardsHint: You don't have any card registered yet. Add one under Cards to use this option.
recurringForm.creditCardHint: Confirmed occurrences are added as purchases on this card's invoice

importReview.instructions: Uncheck items that should not be imported. Previously imported transactions are automatically skipped.
importReview.cancelDesc: No transactions will be created and this batch will be marked as canceled.
